mapper.insert: INSERT INTO meeting_event_log ( event_id,message_id,meeting_id,user_id,event_type,send_to_type,receive_user_id, status,retry_count,error_reason,create_time,update_time ) VALUES ( #{bean.eventId},#{bean.messageId},#{bean.meetingId},#{bean.userId},#{bean.eventType},#{bean.sendToType}, #{bean.receiveUserId},#{bean.status},#{bean.retryCount},#{bean.errorReason},#{bean.createTime},#{bean.updateTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE meeting_id = VALUES(meeting_id), user_id = VALUES(user_id), event_type = VALUES(event_type), send_to_type = VALUES(send_to_type), receive_user_id = VALUES(receive_user_id), status = VALUES(status), retry_count = VALUES(retry_count), error_reason = VALUES(error_reason), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
mapper.update: UPDATE meeting_event_log SET status = #{status}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, error_reason = #{errorReason}, update_time = now() WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
